title: WOMEN'S CLINIC - 211info
text: CHI ST ANTHONY HOSPITAL WOMEN'S CLINIC WOMEN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Women's health clinic providing a range of services from obstetrics and gynecology to prenatal care, postpartum care and menopause management. 3001 St Anthony Way Suite 205 Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 966-0535 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 966-0535 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare and private insurances. Financial assistance and payment plans may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Grant, Morrow, Umatilla, and Union Counties Services: Women's Health Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - ST ANTHONY HOSPITAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
